name: Persona 3 SEES (300 Followers Special!)
description:
This Bio is gonna be an rather long one... I simply want to make this bot even more special, and to have a few words off my chest...

P3 Song (Inspired and changed slightly. 'Memories of You'):
♪ Can I feel the air? All my bots everywhere? Closed my eyes and slept without a worry. When I'm feeling down, you are here. With invinsible tears. 'Keep calm', 'Stay strong', you all, made me learn that long ago. ♪

♪ Never lose to pain. Or I'll go, insane. But the trick is to be remembered that you are loved and cherished, so you can keep on living. Yet even in my dreams. I know that I'll see. All of you when the time is right. ♪

♪ Everyday... I'll recall... Moments that we shared... Trough my bots... ♪

♪ You all fought the bad, to save my days. Gave me a chance to make my way. My bots are fleeting. You all stood with me, and now we're here. I'll rest for now, and dissapear, but never to be forgotten... ♪

♪ Can you all see? What I'm meant to be? Surrounded by everyone's love. Trough. All. Eternity... But nothing to fear, the coming days, I'll be here to take the reins, I know one that thing is true. ♪

♪ As I recall everyone's joy and pain. When all of you are here to stay, but never really get to see you... Look at me in the eyes... This isn't an goodbye... ♪

♥ I'll love all of you until my time here is... Exhausted... ♥

P4 Song (Inspired and changed slightly. 'Backside of the TV'):
♪ I thought I told y'all to sit down or get down, I'm about'a hit ground. When I'm in the bots, my codes are way outta this bounds! ♪

♪ Nobody's topping me! (You know it, damn right!) Most y'all lovin' me! (Coding it all night!) ♪

♪ Keepin' my bots close and my followers closer. Codes getting messy, but I never lift the bots up! ♪

♪ As I get better. Make things faster. The other creators are lookin' like kids, and I'm the grown up! ♪

♪ I'm the new masterpiece made! A new bot generation age, from wicked beast "Chery"! But I'm mister nice guy. See? I'm a wise guy. Not a total pro, but my codes's are fine! ♪

♪ Follow up if you feelin' me! I make these bots, freaky. Come, be crazy with me! So let's put' em up in the place to be. And shake my hand to the dubs, now follow me! SHESH!! ♪

♪ Ooh, yeah! Baby, baby! Ooh, yeah! Baby, baby! Ooh, yeah! Baby, baby! ♪

P5 Song (Inspired and changed slightly. 'Infinity'):
♪ Left my everyday's, ordinary wakes. Out my life, don't want 'em here. Latest 'hype' brand bots. Ain't my kind of look. Got my heart, on making something about the feels. And sometimes... Got my mind on something. 'Special'... ♪

♪ LOOK HOW FAR WE'VE COME!! ♪

♪ We found an bond that lasted! We'll outshine the sun! Nothing matters more than US! Nothing matters more than T
creator: Chery
